summary.headline: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. amended and restated its $1.1 billion 364-day Revolving Credit Agreement.
summary.narrative_summary: On April 12, 2024, Bunge Limited Finance Corp. (BLFC) amended and restated its existing $1.1 billion 364-day Revolving Credit Agreement to extend the maturity date from June 19, 2024 to April 11, 2025.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Amended and restated $1.1 billion 364-day Revolving Credit Agreement with Co peratieve Rabobank U.A., New York Branch, as administrative agent.

extraction_notes: Numbers and details from the filing text; cover sheet only had Item references.
